name: Managing POS Security Features
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can control which POS functions different security profiles can access by configuring POS security features, restricting capabilities like refunds, price changes, cost visibility, and voucher creation based on staff roles and responsibilities. Properly configured POS security helps protect your retail operations from unauthorized discounting, inappropriate refunds, and access to sensitive cost information, ensuring appropriate staff oversight for high-risk transaction functions."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Setting up role-based POS security profiles helps retail operators balance operational efficiency with appropriate controls, allowing managers enhanced permissions while restricting junior staff to basic transaction processing, with security overrides available when authorized users need to grant temporary access."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The POS Security area controls which POS functions are enabled or disabled for different Security Profiles e.g refunds, editing of sales and viewing cost information."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To explain the different sections of user security:"}]}, {"type": "table", "children": [{"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Profile Security"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Used to create Security Profiles, and enable/disable access to Back Office functionality for each Profile."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "POS Security"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Used to enable/disable POS features for each Security Profile"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Users"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Individual logins for staff members. Each user is assigned to a Security Profile, and inherit access to different features of the system as defined in the Profile Security and POS Security areas."}]}]}]}], "id": "rich-table-b872962e"}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "The ability to access POS Security Features is determined by the User Security Profile. If you cannot access this feature please contact your company administrative staff."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The ability to create vouchers can be turned on/off per Security Profile, along with the specific "}, {"text": "type ", "italic": true}, {"text": "of Voucher e.g. Credit Note, Gift Voucher etc. For example, your system could be configured so that Store Managers can issue Credit Notes, while all staff are able to create Gift Vouchers. See the Voucher section below for more information."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Enabling/Disabling features for Profiles"}], "data-id": "enabling-disabling-features-for-profiles"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To manage access to POS features:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Navigate to "}, {"text": "Staff > POS Security Features", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Select a "}, {"text": "Profile", "bold": true}, {"text": " from the drop-down"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Tick the "}, {"text": "Enabled ", "bold": true}, {"text": "tick box to enable access to the required features"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Untick the "}, {"text": "Enabled ", "bold": true}, {"text": "tick box to remove access"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click "}, {"text": "Save", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Ensure all users "}, {"text": "log out of POS ", "bold": true}, {"text": "for the changes to take effect (note that closing the browser will not be enough for the changes to take place - see the article on "}, {"text": "Logging Out"}, {"text": " for more information)"}]}]}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "If you need to create a new Profile navigate to "}, {"text": "Staff > Profile Security.", "bold": true}, {"text": " For detailed information, see the "}, {"text": "Profile Security"}, {"text": " article."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppTmyEAE.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppTmyEAE.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "mceclip0 - 2023-07-08T184514.135.png"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Should a User try to access a function they are not enabled for a security prompt will appear at POS. An authorised user can enter their User ID and Password to perform an override and grant temporary access to the function."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, If unticked, the user will be restricted to viewing only transactions for Outlets as per the Outlet Access list in their "}, {"text": "User Settings"}, {"text": "."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Allow The User To View Any Offline Server Details"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Allow the user to view any "}, {"text": "Offline Server"}, {"text": " details"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Allow The User To View The Dashboard"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Allow the user to view the "}, {"text": "POS Dashboard"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Allow Transfers"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Allow the user to access "}, {"text": "Transfers at POS"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Allow Transfers - Void"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Allow the user to Void Transfers in POS"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Cancel Order"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Cancel or VOID a Sale."}, {"text": "\u00a0This does not delete the sale or any payments made, which will still apply to income, however does exclude the sale from any stock movement calculations."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Change User/Date"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Change the "}, {"text": "Staff Member, Outlet, Register, Sales Date/Time "}, {"text": "associated with the sale. This will only change the date of the sale, and will not affect the date/time of payments or of allocation/fulfilment of products."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Edit Order Status"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Manually edit the order status (e.g., Incomplete, Awaiting Payment)"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Marketing & Loyalty"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Allow the user to access the Marketing & Loyalty page to manage "}, {"text": "Loyalty Redemption"}, {"text": " and\u00a0"}, {"text": "Survey Segments questions"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "No Tax On The Order"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Allows access to the \"No Tax\" checkbox to\u00a0"}, {"text": "Remove Tax"}, {"text": "\u00a0from the order."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Show Comments"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "View and apply\u00a0"}, {"text": "Public and Private Comments"}, {"text": " to the order. Public comments appear on the invoice and receipt. Private comments are only viewable by staff."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Show Costs"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Access display of associated\u00a0"}, {"text": "Cost Price and GP"}, {"text": "\u00a0information for all products on an order."}]}]}]}], "id": "rich-table-3844aff8"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Enabling/disabling different voucher types for each Profile"}], "data-id": "enabling-disabling-different-voucher-types-for-each-profile"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "All users will have access to redeem all voucher types, provided "}, {"text": "vouchers are enabled as a Payment Type."}, {"text": " However, you can restrict the ability to create individual voucher types within POS to specific Profiles only."}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Navigate to "}, {"text": "Staff > POS Security Features", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Select the "}, {"text": "Security Profile", "bold": true}, {"text": " from the drop-down"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Scroll to the bottom of the page to locate the "}, {"text": "Voucher Type ", "bold": true}, {"text": "section"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Tick the "}, {"text": "Enabled ", "bold": true}, {"text": "option to enable access to a particular voucher"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click "}, {"text": "Save", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Ensure all users "}, {"text": "log out of POS ", "bold": true}, {"text": "for the changes to take effect (note that closing the browser will not be enough for the changes to take place -
